Inside the book

A Field Guide, Not a Magic Box

AI is no longer science fiction — it writes, draws, codes, and reasons alongside us every day. AI Odyssey is a field guide for middle & high school students, curious learners, and educators: a way to understand AI not as a mysterious black box, but as a tool you can question, direct, and use wisely.

The journey moves from the history of AI, through how generative models actually work, into practical study strategies, real classroom case studies, the ethics every citizen should know — and finally your own first lines of Python code. The recurring idea throughout: AI IS A COACH, NEVER A CRUTCH.

Infographics turn big ideas into a single glance, key-term boxes build vocabulary, try-it exercises turn reading into doing, and quick reviews at every chapter's end let you test yourself. Nine appendices — from a 30-day challenge to a 60-prompt library — make it a companion long after the last chapter.
